title: version field uses 'latest' string sentinel instead of an enum
description: GcpSmBackend stores version: String where the special value 'latest' acts as a sentinel meaning 'track the latest version'. The put() guard is 'if self.version \!= "latest"' — a string comparison on a magic value. An enum makes this unrepresentable-by-accident: enum SecretVersion { Latest, Pinned(String) }. The put() guard becomes a match arm. The validate_gcp_resource_name_component call for version only applies to the Pinned variant. Invalid states (empty version string) become unrepresentable. This is internal to the struct so it's not a public API break.
